LAW AND MOTION, DEPT. 302, PLAINTIFF MARIAH MORRIS MOTION'S FOR APPOINTMENT OF RECEIVER AND PRELIMINARY INJUNCTION IS CONTINUED ON THE COURT'S OWN MOTION TO JANUARY 11, 2018 AT 9:30 AM TO GIVE THE PARTIES AN OPPORTUNITY TO ATTEMPT TO SETTLE THEIR DIFFERENCES WITH THE ASSISTANCE OF THE COURT'S SETTLEMENT OFFICER PANG LY. PER LOCAL RULE 5, COUNSEL AND THE PARTIES ARE REQUIRED TO ATTEND A SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE WITH MS. LY IN ROOM 603 (ON THE SIXTH FLOOR ACROSS THE HALL FROM COURTROOMS 602 AND 604) AT 9:30AM ON JANUARY 10, 2018. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: JOSE RIOS MERIDA; REPORTER: NOT REPORTED. (302/HEK)

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-05-2018 Off Calendar

MOTION For Appointment Of Receiver And Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-11-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: PLAINTIFF MARIAH MORRIS' MOTION For Appointment Of Receiver And Preliminary Injunction is off calendar. The Court was notified that the parties have executed a final settlement agreement. Judge: Harold E. Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

MOTION For Appointment Of Receiver And Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Jan-09-2018 Continued To Jan-11-18 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances.

The Court confirms the tentative ruling.

PLAINTIFF MARIAH MORRIS MOTION'S For Appointment Of Receiver And Preliminary Injunction is Continued on the court's own motion to January 11, 2018 at 9:30 AM to give the parties an opportunity to attempt to settle their differences with the assistance of the court's settlement officer Pang Ly. Per Local Rule 5, counsel and the parties are required to attend a settlement conference with Ms. Ly in room 603 (on the sixth floor across the hall from courtrooms 602 and 604) at 9:30am on January 10, 2018.

Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Jose Rios Merida; Reporter: Not Reported. (D302)
